steps.title: Compare the viewpoints
steps.content: Text 1 explains the millennial whoop and ends with a negative judgment: it appeared so frequently that it could become irritating. Text 2 agrees that the whoop could be annoying but adds that it could also be fun or moving and was sometimes used well.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong relationships
steps.content: Choice A invents competing explanations for events that inspired a song. Choice C shifts to recording techniques, which neither text discusses. Choice D refers to critics praising or disapproving of a style of music, but the texts discuss a repeated musical pattern. The relationship is negative view followed by a more positive view. The answer is B.
